Business Manager
Framework Foundations
BUSINESS MANAGER
IMPORTANT REMINDER: The Client does NOT need to create their own Business
Manager UNLESS they are trying to create more ad accounts.
If you are running ads on behalf of clients, you'll need to be accessing their ad account
and page through Business Manager - a tool that allows you to manage all client
assets in one place (and with just one login). Below I take you through what Business
Manager is and how to access client accounts.
Business Manager allows you to easily manage all of your client accounts under one
hub and to provide access to various members of your team without ever having to
exchange passwords.
Business Manager uses a separate link to Facebook: business.facebook.com
A different link to Facebook (business.facebook.com)
You need a Personal Facebook account to create a Business Manager
You can add team members or contractors using their work email (instead of their
personal profiles)
Usually new Business Managers have a limit of 2-5 ad accounts, you need to request
to increase this
